programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators introduce viewers to various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use innovative animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The creators introduce viewers to various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of modern astronomy.The series will use innovative animation techniques.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure 2
programme.desc: The series shows how treasure hunters find sunken ships.They use a special map that was created by American astronaut Gordon Cooper for many years.

programme.sub-title: The search for the golden table

programme.title: How It's Made 23
programme.sub-title: Fishing lines, mixers, baking soda and tow trucks
programme.desc: Documentary filmmakers visit production plants to look at the process of creating objects that surround people every day.

programme.title: Building Germany
programme.desc: Viewers will look at the everyday life of people who work on the largest infrastructure projects in Germany.We will find out what people doing difficult and dangerous jobs do.

programme.title: Building Germany
programme.desc: Viewers will look at the everyday life of people who work on the largest infrastructure projects in Germany.We will find out what people doing difficult and dangerous jobs do.

programme.title: The Dino Hunters
programme.desc: For years, American cowboys lived only by raising cattle.For some time now, many of them have been choosing a different business path - searching for dinosaur bones.They charge handsomely for their finds.

programme.title: The Dino Hunters
programme.desc: For years, American cowboys lived only by raising cattle.For some time now, many of them have been choosing a different business path - searching for dinosaur bones.They charge handsomely for their finds.

programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: A group of specialists research various theories and the latest reports regarding monsters straight from legends and scary stories.

programme.title: In Search of Monsters
programme.desc: A group of specialists research various theories and the latest reports regarding monsters straight from legends and scary stories.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.sub-title: The secret of the Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Josh Gates has created a team of researchers with whom he checks reports of paranormal phenomena and mysterious objects and creatures.The team will reach, among others, Mexico and the Cambodian jungle.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates has created a team of researchers with whom he checks reports of paranormal phenomena and mysterious objects and creatures.The team will reach, among others, Mexico and the Cambodian jungle.

programme.title: Building Germany

programme.title: Extreme Engineering 6
programme.desc: The authors of the document present the behind-the-scenes of the construction and operation of extraordinary structures, such as huge stadiums, bridges, tunnels and aircraft carriers.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies 2
programme.desc: The second series of the program.In this installment, producers will reveal the secrets of legendary places, the most important inventions and influential figures.Viewers will learn facts that have not appeared in books and historical studies before.This season of the series will be devoted to the secrets of Las Vegas;the history of American Nazis;stories about ancient astronauts.In subsequent episodes, viewers will take on the role of detectives who discover the mysteries of world history themselves.They will also look behind the scenes of secret societies.They will analyze the biographies of famous people and the subsequent stages of creating innovative inventions.They will visit legendary, popular places from around the world and learn about iconic objects.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies 2
programme.desc: The second series of the program.In this installment, producers will reveal the secrets of legendary places, the most important inventions and influential figures.Viewers will learn facts that have not appeared in books and historical studies before.This season of the series will be devoted to the secrets of Las Vegas;the history of American Nazis;stories about ancient astronauts.In subsequent episodes, viewers will take on the role of detectives who discover the mysteries of world history themselves.They will also look behind the scenes of secret societies.They will analyze the biographies of famous people and the subsequent stages of creating innovative inventions.They will visit legendary, popular places from around the world and learn about iconic objects.
